chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Matters Related to Hajj

text: 3131 - وَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أُمِرْتُمْ بِالْحَجِّ وَ اَلْعُمْرَةِ فَلاَ تُبَالُوا بِأَيِّهِمَا بَدَأْتُمْ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3131 - Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"You have been commanded to perform Hajj and Umrah, so do not worry about which one you begin with."
